title: Appointment detail is hydrating inside the same shell
copy_rule: Keep known shell identity and anchor visible while only unresolved footprint hydrates.
dominant_question: Is this still the appointment I opened?

title: No task needs action in this queue right now
copy_rule: Explain what usually appears here and why calm no-work is different from filter-empty.
dominant_question: Is the queue truly quiet or did my filters hide work?

title: Only watchful coordination summaries remain
copy_rule: Show the smallest truthful residual summary instead of decorative filler.
dominant_question: What is the safest next coordination lens?

title: The workbench is partially visible and bounded
copy_rule: Keep visible safe summary explicit and name what is withheld.
dominant_question: What remains safe to review while withheld fields catch up?

title: The board stays visible while projection truth is under review
copy_rule: Preserve the last stable board and suppress writable reassurance until freshness is reviewed.
dominant_question: Can I trust the current incident board enough to act?

title: Recovery is required before the dispense line can resume
copy_rule: Keep the blocked object visible and make one recovery path dominant.
dominant_question: What is the single safe recovery path for this line?

title: The diff remains visible but writable posture is fenced
copy_rule: Preserve analytical scope while explicitly failing closed on mutation controls.
dominant_question: What can still be reviewed without reopening mutation posture?

title: The record stays structured but only the governed placeholder is visible
copy_rule: Occupy truthful spatial structure and never imply the hidden body is ready.
dominant_question: What is this result and what is withheld right now?

title: This message thread remains calm but bounded
copy_rule: Suppress ordinary reassurance while keeping the safe summary and return path visible.
dominant_question: What is still safe to understand from this conversation right now?

title: The transfer summary stays visible with one bounded recovery path
copy_rule: Stay on the same shell and keep only one governed resume path dominant.
dominant_question: Can this transfer recover inside the same shell?
